transcript: Speaker A: What is your native language? Speaker B: My native language is Marathi. Speaker A: Wow, your English sounds great! Speaker B: A few months ago, I didn't speak English at all. I couldn't get a job. Speaker A: Seriously? How did you learn so fast? Speaker B: I have an AI tutor that helps me. Speaker A: Wow, that's amazing. Show me! Speaker C: नेहा, आज कशी आहेस? [Neha, how are you today?] Speaker B: Great. I am being interviewed right now. Speaker C: अगदी बरोबर. इंटरव्यू कशाबद्दल आहे? [Exactly. What is the interview about?] Speaker B: It's about my English skills. They say me I speak with confidence. Speaker C: "They say me" नाही, "They say I speak with confidence" म्हणायचं. [Not "They say me", say "They say I speak with confidence".] Speaker B: Oh, they say I speak with confidence. Speaker C: Excellent. आता तू खूप naturally English बोलत आहेस. [Excellent. Now you are speaking English very naturally.] Speaker B: हो, आधी मला English बोलायला खूप भीती वाटायची. [Yes, earlier I used to feel very scared to speak English.] Speaker C: आणि आता तू कॉन्फिडेंटली इंटरव्यू देत आहेस. [And now you are confidently giving an interview.] Speaker B: Thanks to you! Speaker C: माझ्यासोबत रोज फक्त १० मिनिटं English practice करा. मी तुमच्या प्रत्येक चुकीला instantly correct करेन आणि speaking मध्ये मदत करेन, anytime, anywhere. [Practice English with me for just 10 minutes daily. I will instantly correct your every mistake and help you in speaking, anytime, anywhere.] Speaker C: १ कोटीपेक्षा जास्त युजर्स MySivi वर प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. तुम्हीही आजच सुरू करा! फक्त १ रुपयामध्ये MySivi डाउनलोड करा. [More than 1 crore users are practicing on MySivi. You too start today! Download MySivi for just 1 rupee.]

summary: A woman shares how she learned fluent English using an AI tutor after struggling to find a job. She demonstrates the MySivi app, showing how the AI avatar instantly corrects her grammar mistakes in real-time. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app for just 1 rupee.
